message: Node started: Search for theoretical physics literature (arXiv, journals) regarding the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Identify the three specific universal dimensionless constants that govern the quantum-to-classical transition or the statistical properties of these photons. Provide their exact numerical values as derived in the literature. Look for parameters such as squeezing parameters, specific occupation number ratios, or constants related to the Bogoliubov coefficients in curved spacetime.
